scripts.build: pnpm --filter @xuanzhi/shared build && pnpm --filter @xuanzhi/api build && pnpm --filter @xuanzhi/web build && pnpm --filter xuanzhi-artifacts build
scripts.claw:build: cd openclaw && pnpm build && pnpm ui:build
scripts.claw:status: cd openclaw && pnpm openclaw gateway status
scripts.claw:plugins: cd openclaw && pnpm openclaw plugins list
